# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket to store user-uploaded files and application backups

Resources:
  UserUploadedFilesBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: user-uploaded-files-bucket
      AccessControl: Private

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref UserUploadedFilesBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: arn:aws:iam::YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID:role/YOUR_APPLICATION_IAM_ROLE
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub '${UserUploadedFilesBucket.Arn}/*'
